sglang.title: Add missing license for router wheel
sglang.author: MrAta
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Some package registries require every wheel having a valid license.
Modifications
Updates pyproject.toml to include the license for the router wheel.

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Contributor Guide.
 Update documentati

sglang.title: Improve torch compile for fused moe
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Following the discussion from #2278.
The final solution:

Only do torch.compile for moe layers at bs=1
Skip torch.compile for moe layers when bs > 1
Add dynamic=False in places where the shape should be known

sglang.title: Fix gptq for moe layers
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Try to fix #2117 #2270
We can run python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model TheBloke/Mixtral-8x7B-v0.1-GPTQ with vllm's fused moe layer, but cannot run it with sglang's fused moe layer.
We should probably add this model to nightly eval.
Test cases
python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model TheBloke/Mixtr

vllm.title: [Speculative Decoding] Move indices to device before filtering output
vllm.author: zhengy001

vllm.title: [V1] VLM - Run the mm_mapper preprocessor in the frontend process
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds support to run the multi-modal mapper/preprocessor (from huggingface) in the frontend process. Execution of 512 prompts with 64 output tokens results in 1.7X improvement. Command used:
VLLM_USE_V1=1 VLLM_ENABLE_V1_MULTIPROCESSING=1 python examples/offline_inference_vision_language.py -m

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Only require XGrammar on x86
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
XGrammar doesn't currently publish a non-x86 manylinux wheel (https://pypi.org/project/xgrammar/#files) so we must restrict usage based on CPU currently.
FIX #10785 (comment)
Tested on M1 Mac using Docker:
docker build -f Dockerfile.arm -t vllm-cpu-env --shm-size=4g .

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Frontend] correctly record prefill and decode time metrics
vllm.author: tomeras91
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR fixes a small bug where vllm:request_prefill_time_seconds metric recorded the decode time and vllm:request_decode_time_seconds recorded the prefill time

vllm.title: [Build][Bugfix] Using the correct type hint
vllm.author: gshtras
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix type hint error introduced in #10769
This becomes critical when using cython compilation
cc @DarkLight1337

vllm.title: [Benchmark] Benchmark structured output with datasets
vllm.author: xuechendi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add structure output benchmark.
Base PR: #10046
Additional work:

add 4 guided options -  'grammar', 'choice', 'regex' and 'json'; For Json, add single-json and use 'xgrammar_benchmark'(multi-schema)
add option for guided_decoding_ratio, default is 1.0, ratio < 1.0 provided a mixed requests containi

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Replace mean with torch.all in test_pynccl.py
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Make the pynccl tests more robust by using torch.all instead of taking the mean to make sure that every element of a tensor equals some scala

vllm.title: Drop ROCm load format check
vllm.author: wangxiyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The value  of rocm_not_supported_load_format is kept be empty for all most one year from #2180. I assume this check is not needed now.
This PR clean up the related check code. Once the check is need again in the future, the better way is to move to platform module instead.

vllm.title: [ci/build] Change queue name for Release jobs
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
We are moving Release pipeline into CI cluster and there is now a separation of premerge and postmerge for CPU queue
This changes the queue name for Release jobs to use cpu_queue_postmerge with permission to upload wheels to S3.

vllm.title: [ci/build] Job to build and push release image
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Add new optional job in Release pipeline to build and push vllm-openai image to Release ECR
